Cors._comment: Dev origins of the Blazor WASM client (launchSettings.json). Real environments supply Cors__AllowedOrigins__0 etc. via env when the SPA is served cross-origin; leave empty behind a same-origin reverse proxy (05-security.md).

Jwt._comment: Dev-only signing key. In real environments supply Jwt__SigningKey via env/secret store, never source control (05-security.md). Must be at least 32 characters.

Storage._comment: Dev-only blob root, relative to the API working directory. Real environments supply Storage__RootPath via env / volume mount (07-storage-and-deployment.md).

Observability._comment: Dev OTLP sink: the aspire-dashboard compose service, port published on the host (docker compose --profile observability up -d aspire-dashboard). Export is silently dropped while the dashboard is down (ADR-013).

AiAnalysis._comment: Dev overrides for the Ollama provider (opt in with AiAnalysis__Provider=Ollama). CPU-only inference in Docker is slow: the 1b model plus a generous timeout keeps analyses finishing on modest hardware (06-ai-analysis-pipeline.md).
